title: Brandishes an Exotic Shield
summary: You deploy an amazing shield of pure force that provides protection and some offensive options.
tiers: Tier 3: Healing Pulse or Throw Force Shield
Tier 6: Bouncing Shield or Shield Burst
gm_intrusions: The shield is temporarily lost. A foe temporarily ends up with the shield.
text: You deploy an amazing shield of pure force that provides protection and some offensive options.
details: You deploy an amazing shield of pure force that provides protection and some offensive options.
